s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR CENTER SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Detach the 2 front hooks of the seat cushion from the vehicle body.

atten3.ptxt: Follow the instructions below carefully as the cushion frame can be deformed easily.

s3.ptxt: Choose a hook to detach first. Place your hands near the hook as shown in the illustration. Then lift the seat cushion to detach the hook.
Repeat the step above for the other hook.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY (for Fixed Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 rear seat belts from the 3 rear seat shoulder belt guides.
Remove the 4 bolts and rear seat back assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY RH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SIDE SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY RH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT BACK COVER (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, detach the claws and remove the 2 rear seat back covers.

item.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.
Use the same procedures for the RH side and LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY RH (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 3 clamps and then separate the cover.
Remove the 2 bolts and 2 nuts and separate type rear seat back assembly RH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR SCUFF PLATE RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: DISCONNECT REAR DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP RH
REMOVE RECLINING REMOTE CONTROL LEVER SUB-ASSEMBLY RH (for Reclining Seat Type)
REMOVE ROOF SIDE INNER GARNISH RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side (see page ).

s3.ptxt: Remove the bolt and amplifier antenna assembly.
Remove the 2 bolts and amplifier antenna assembly.
